T0190.title: QR-Code Reverse Lookup
T0190.definition: In illicit data trading, a type of record lookup service where a software account's QR code is used to query the associated user's phone number.
T0190.description: In illicit data trading, a type of record lookup service where a software account's QR code is used to query the associated user's phone number.
T0190.usageExample: "Accepting QR reverse lookups, all reverse queries welcome, high efficiency and speed, no tricks"
